# Evaluation — Stage 2: Standard

**Generated by:** the fixed code-generation model, `gpt-oss:20b` (its output self-attributes to "ChatGPT (OpenAI)" in a comment — consistent with an OpenAI open-weight model).
**Reviewed by:** functional testing + code review in this session (`pygame-ce` 2.5.7, Python 3.12). See `../benchmark-results.md` for provenance.

## What was tested

| Check | Method | Result |
|---|---|---|
| Launches without error | headless run, ~120 frames | ✅ pass |
| Frame-rate-independent physics | reads `vel_y += GRAVITY; y += vel_y` (no `dt`) | ⚠️ **per-frame, not dt-scaled** |
| Ground/ceiling ends the game | replayed line-159 boundary check, no flap | ✅ game over at frame 29 |
| Pipe collision ends the game | `colliderect` on both segments | ✅ present |
| Score increments on pass | guarded by `passed` flag | ✅ present |
| Off-screen pipes removed | list-comprehension filter | ✅ present |
| Timed pipe spawning | `SPAWN_INTERVAL` ms via `get_ticks()` | ✅ present |
| Restart after game over | space/click resets state | ✅ present |
| Edge-triggered flap | `KEYDOWN`/`MOUSEBUTTONDOWN` events | ✅ no held-key repeat |

## Notable strengths

Clean, well-commented, type-hinted rect properties; sensible gap-position margins that keep the gap inside the playfield; time-based (not frame-count-based) pipe spawning.

## Weaknesses / rough edges

- **Physics is per-frame, not `dt`-scaled.** Because gravity and pipe speed are added once per frame with no time delta, the whole game runs faster or slower if the achieved frame rate drifts from 60 FPS. This is the single clearest quality gap versus the advanced stage — and, notably, a **regression versus the zero-shot output**, which *was* dt-based. A vivid illustration of single-run, small-model variance.
- No start screen and no high score (the zero-shot output had both).
- No max-fall-speed clamp.

## Independent functional-review score (1–10, Claude)

| Correctness | Completeness | Code quality | Constraint adherence | Overall |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 7 | 7 | 8 | 8 | **7.5** |

> **`gpt-oss:20b` rubric scores (per stated methodology): _pending_.**
